title: leptotes bicolor subsp. serrulata
intro: Leptotes bicolor subsp. serrulata, also known as the slender lip orchid, is a flowering plant species in the orchid family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and rheumatism, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Leptotes bicolor subsp. serrulata include its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues, an anti-inflammatory to reduce pain and swelling, and an antiseptic to prevent infections. Leptotes bicolor subsp. serrulata is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
